name: classify_attendance_present_functional
description: Validates that the /classify endpoint correctly classifies an employee as Present when check-in is on time, no leave, and not a holiday.
input: POST /classify with AttendanceInput: employee_id='emp1', checkin_time='09:00', shift_start='09:00', leave_status='None', holiday_status='None', date='2024-06-01'
output: AttendanceOutput with success=True, attendance_status='Present', message containing 'Present'
